rules.name: cv_local_alone
rules.description: Retake when cv-local face-quad fit is NOT structurally consistent (status != 'ok').

rules.name: phase_or_cv_T8.0
rules.description: Retake when |phase_sep| < 8.0 OR cv-local NOT consistent.

rules.name: phase_or_cv_T11.7
rules.description: Retake when |phase_sep| < 11.7 OR cv-local NOT consistent.

rules.name: phase_or_cv_T15.0
rules.description: Retake when |phase_sep| < 15.0 OR cv-local NOT consistent.

rules.name: phase_and_cv_T8.0
rules.description: Retake when |phase_sep| < 8.0 AND cv-local NOT consistent.

rules.name: phase_and_cv_T11.7
rules.description: Retake when |phase_sep| < 11.7 AND cv-local NOT consistent.

rules.name: phase_and_cv_T15.0
rules.description: Retake when |phase_sep| < 15.0 AND cv-local NOT consistent.

rules.name: cv_severe_alone
rules.description: Retake when cv-local status is `fewer_than_3_face_quads` (the more severe failure mode — geometry couldn't even find 3 faces).
